rationale: The cited paper is directly about cross-media synergy in multimedia communications (TV/print interaction, dynamic carryover, and budget/mix implications), which aligns closely with the citing editorial’s stated synthesis of prior work on media source/modality effects and multimedia marketing theory. Given this strong conceptual overlap and the editorial’s role as an integrative review, this citation is plausibly foundational/theory-sourcing rather than an obvious incidental mention.
